title: digest.len() as c_int in pcr_read uses 'as' cast — should be infallible constant
description: device.rs:132: 'let mut digest_len: c_int = digest.len() as c_int' where digest is [0u8; 64]. The array length is a compile-time constant (64) that trivially fits in c_int. Using 'as' here adds no clarity and could mask truncation if the array is ever resized. The idiomatic form is '64i32' or 'i32::try_from(digest.len()).expect("const fits")'. At minimum, a comment like '// 64 < i32::MAX' should accompany the cast.
